intended_use: Rapid LVO is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of CTA head images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiolo
intended_use_full: Rapid LVO is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of CTA head images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive ICA or MCA-M1 Large Vessel Occlusion (LVO) findings in head CTA images.
target_condition: Large Vessel Occlusion (ICA or MCA-M1) in acute stroke
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: 3.18 min (95% CI: 3.11 – 3.25), meeting goal of ≤3.5 min
